title: scleranthus annuus subsp. polycarpos
intro: Scleranthus annuus subsp. polycarpos is a subspecies of flowering plant, commonly known as the annual knawel, belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to regulate menstrual cycles and reduce symptoms associated with PMS, such as anxiety and irritability. The health benefits of Scleranthus annuus subsp. polycarpos include its potential to alleviate hormonal imbalances, promote relaxation, and support overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and infusions, often used in traditional herbal medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
